description: Zhipu AI GLM-4.7 is a large language model with 32B parameters
card_text:
GLM-4.7 from Zhipu AI (z.ai).

**Model Type:** Language Model
**Concurrency Limit:** 2
**Parameters:** 32B
**Context Window:** 128K tokens
**Language Support:** Chinese, English, multilingual
**API:** Available via z.ai platform
**Use Cases:** general text generation and analysis
